measurement_note: Size is n, the common sensor length. The arrays share n-2 readings before sensor 1 reveals a dropped penultimate value, so the full prefix and suffix must be inspected. The two-alignment scan takes O(n). A correct implementation that reconstructs and compares both possible shifted recordings for every candidate failure position takes O(n^2), completes all legal tiers, and fails only by scaling.
